growth.title: Business Growth
growth.reviewRatesDesc: Most detailers undercharge. Consider a 10% rate increase for long-term customers - most will stay.
growth.trackMaterialsDesc: Know exactly what each job costs you. Track inventory and see your true profit margins.
growth.knowEquipmentRoiDesc: Track jobs per tool to understand which equipment investments paid off.
growth.aiDesc: Research prospects and generate personalized cold call, email, and LinkedIn scripts

jobs.jobsWillAppear: Jobs will appear here after you complete quotes and log hours.

jobPhotos.documentBeforeStarting: Document the aircraft condition before starting
jobPhotos.tipDamage: Capture any existing damage or stains before starting
jobPhotos.tipWideShots: Take wide shots and close-ups of problem areas
jobPhotos.tipVideoWalkAround: Video walk-around shows more than photos
jobPhotos.tipSocialMedia: After photos are great for social media
jobPhotos.customerCanView: Your customer can view these in their portal.

sendQuote.phoneRequiredSms: Customer phone is required for SMS
sendQuote.scheduleMustBeFuture: Scheduled time must be in the future
sendQuote.usedOfFreeQuotes: You've used {used} of {limit} free quotes this month.
sendQuote.whoToContact: Who should we contact about this aircraft?
sendQuote.emergencyContactLabel: Emergency contact for day of service
sendQuote.contactNotes: Contact notes (e.g., best time to call, gate access code...)
sendQuote.wantUsToText: Want us to text it for you?
sendQuote.addPhoneForSms: Add a phone number above to send via SMS.
sendQuote.quoteWillBeSentAt: Quote will be sent automatically at this time.
sendQuote.billingEvery4Weeks: Billing every 4 weeks = 13 cycles/year vs 12 months = 8% more annual revenue.
sendQuote.consider4WeekBilling: Consider 4-week billing for 8% more annual revenue. Most customers won't notice the difference!
sendQuote.businessPlanBullet1: Client receives SMS + email with your quote
sendQuote.businessPlanBullet2: You'll get notified when they view it
sendQuote.businessPlanBullet3: They can accept and pay online with one click
sendQuote.freePlanBullet1: Client receives an email with your quote
sendQuote.freePlanBullet2: They can view, accept, and pay online

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong

weather.addHomeAirport: Add your home airport in Settings to see local weather and job-day forecasts.

tour.createFirstQuoteDesc: Select an aircraft, choose services, and generate a professional quote in seconds. This is the heart of Vector.
tour.addServicesRatesDesc: Set up the services you offer with your pricing. Head to Settings to configure your service menu, hourly rates, and packages.
tour.viewCalendarDesc: See all your scheduled jobs at a glance. Paid quotes automatically appear on your calendar.
tour.trackPerformanceDesc: Monitor revenue trends, conversion rates, busiest days, and more with detailed analytics.
tour.quickStatsDesc: Your key metrics at a glance — weekly revenue, outstanding quotes, and recent activity all in one place.

servicesSettings.howPricingWorksDesc: Set your hourly rate per service. When you build a quote, hours come from the aircraft database and multiply by your rate. Packages bundle services with an optional discount %. Add-on fees are flat or % surcharges added on top.
servicesSettings.dragToPackages: Drag to packages on the right
servicesSettings.createPackageToBundle: Create a package to bundle services
servicesSettings.addonFeesDesc: Flat or percentage surcharges added on top of service pricing (hazmat, after-hours, rush, etc.)
servicesSettings.whichAircraftTime: Which aircraft time estimate to use for this service
servicesSettings.avgProductCost: Average product/material cost per hour of this service
servicesSettings.packagePriceDesc: Package price = sum of service rates x aircraft hours, minus this discount
servicesSettings.productsNeededDesc: Link inventory products to auto-populate on quotes and jobs
servicesSettings.toolsNeededDesc: Link tools your crew needs for this service

leadIntake.title: AI Lead Intake
leadIntake.questionsDesc: These questions will be asked by the AI chat widget on your website
leadIntake.question: Question
leadIntake.questionPlaceholder: What would you like to ask?
leadIntake.analyzerDesc: Enter your website URL and we'll suggest relevant intake questions based on your services
leadIntake.uploadFaqDesc: Paste your FAQ content and we'll extract Q&A pairs for the AI chatbot
leadIntake.faqsSaved: These FAQs have been saved. The AI chatbot can now answer these questions!
leadIntake.embedWidgetDesc: Add this code to your website to display the AI chat widget
leadIntake.previewDesc: Widget preview would appear on your actual website. Deploy the code to see it in action!

roi.title: ROI Dashboard
roi.shareTestimonial: Would you share a quick testimonial?
roi.testimonialPlaceholder: Tell us what you love about Vector... (optional)

followUp.title: Smart Follow-Up Automation
followUp.alwaysActiveDesc: These features are always on for all users:
followUp.viewedNoAction: Viewed but no action alerts (3 days)

quotesExtra.trackingDataHelp: Tracking this data earns points and helps identify problem customers.
quotesExtra.duplicateDesc: Create a copy of this quote with new customer details.

customersExtra.deleteTagConfirm: Delete this custom tag? It will not be removed from customers.
customersExtra.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Events will appear here when you send quotes, receive payments, etc.

invoicesExtra.selectJobForInvoice: Select a paid or completed job to generate an invoice.

equipmentExtra.addToolsDesc: Add tools and equipment to track usage, maintenance, and ROI
equipmentExtra.supportedSites: Support: Detail King, Autogeek, Amazon, Chemical Guys, P&S, and more

productsExtra.supportedSites: Supports: Detail King, Autogeek, Amazon, Chemical Guys, P&S, and more
productsExtra.reorderAlertPlaceholder: Alert when quantity falls below this

settingsExtra.stripeBeingReviewed: Your Stripe account is being reviewed. This usually takes 1-2 business days.
settingsExtra.stripeNeedsAttention: Your Stripe account needs attention. Online payments are currently disabled on your quotes.
settingsExtra.connectStripeDesc: Connect Stripe to receive payments for your quotes.
settingsExtra.paymentSettingsDesc: Switch between test and live mode for processing payments.
settingsExtra.testModeDesc: No real payments are processed. Use Stripe test cards to verify your setup.
settingsExtra.liveModeDesc: Real payments will be processed through your connected Stripe account.
settingsExtra.liveModeWarningDesc: Customers will be charged real money. Make sure your Stripe account is fully verified and your services/pricing are correct before enabling live mode.
settingsExtra.platformFeeDesc: Vector charges a {rate} platform fee on each job. Choose who pays it.
settingsExtra.iAbsorbFeeDesc: Fee is deducted from your payout. Customer sees only the quote price.
settingsExtra.passFeeDesc: A "Service Fee" line item is added to the customer's quote. You receive the full quote amount.
settingsExtra.localizationDesc: Set your preferred language and currency for your account.
settingsExtra.customerLanguageDesc: Sets your preferred language for customer-facing documents.
settingsExtra.currencyDesc: All prices displayed in this currency. Stripe handles conversion.
settingsExtra.efficiencyFactorDesc: Adjust estimated hours based on your team's speed. 1.0 = standard, 0.8 = 20% faster, 1.2 = 20% slower.
settingsExtra.laborRateDesc: Your internal labor cost per hour. Used for profitability tracking after job completion.
settingsExtra.laborCostNote: This is your cost (wages, overhead), not what you charge customers.
settingsExtra.minimumFeeDesc: Set a minimum charge for jobs. If the quote total is less than this amount, the minimum fee will be applied instead.
settingsExtra.applyToLocationsDesc: Leave empty to apply to all jobs, or add specific airports/locations where this minimum applies.
settingsExtra.feeAppliesToAll: Minimum fee will apply to all locations
settingsExtra.homeAirportDesc: Set your primary airport for weather forecasts and job-day alerts on the dashboard.
settingsExtra.addonFeesDesc: Flat or percentage surcharges (hazmat, after-hours, rush, etc.) added on top of service pricing.
settingsExtra.productRatiosDesc: Customize estimated product quantities per service type. Used in quote builder.
settingsExtra.quoteDisplayDesc: Choose what pricing details customers see on their quotes.
settingsExtra.laborProductsDesc: Shows two line items: labor and products/materials
settingsExtra.fullBreakdownDesc: Shows all service line items with individual pricing
settingsExtra.smsProOnly: SMS alerts are available on Pro plans.
settingsExtra.smsBusinessOnly: Texting clients is available on the Business plan.
settingsExtra.masterSmsToggle: Master toggle for all client SMS
settingsExtra.followUpDesc: Automatically follow up with customers on expiring quotes.
settingsExtra.autoDiscountDesc: Automatically send a discount offer to customers 2 days before their quote expires.
settingsExtra.discountMessage: Customers will receive a {pct}% off email 2 days before their quote expires.
settingsExtra.alwaysActiveItem1: Notification when a quote isn't opened after 2 days
settingsExtra.alwaysActiveItem2: Notification when customer views but doesn't book after 3 days
settingsExtra.alwaysActiveItem3: Customer gets a reminder email 5 days before quote expires
settingsExtra.alwaysActiveItem4: Notification when quotes are about to expire
settingsExtra.referralDesc: Invite other detailers to Vector. You get 1 month free for each signup, they get a 30-day trial.
settingsExtra.noReferrals: No referrals yet. Share your link to start earning free months!

teamExtra.rolePermissionNote: Role determines default permissions. Owner can customize in Team Permissions.
teamExtra.pinNote: Workers use this PIN to log their hours at /time-log
teamExtra.controlPermissions: Control what each role can see and do
teamExtra.ownerDesc: Full access to everything. Cannot be restricted.
teamExtra.managerDesc: Day-to-day operations. Full schedule and customer access.
teamExtra.leadTechDesc: Senior technician. Customer contact and limited schedule.
teamExtra.employeeDesc: Standard worker. Today's jobs and photo uploads only.
teamExtra.contractorDesc: External contractor. Today's jobs and photo uploads only.
